zh.detailedEmptyItems: - 当前未检索到可展开的本地结构化记录。
zh.detailedNoRefs: 当前暂无本地参考文献。
detailedLimitations: 当前结果来自本地图谱子图，完整答案仍以后端知识检索为准。
若动态图谱未完全展开，部分关系可能未显示在当前页面。

relation.title: L1HS 是 LINE-1 谱系中的一个更细粒度节点，当前本地图谱把它作为具体分支来展示。
bullets: L1HS 通过 SUBFAMILY_OF 关系连接到 LINE-1。
这种关系属于分类或谱系层级关系，而不是疾病或功能作用关系。
保留更细粒度的层级有助于区分总家族与具体活跃分支。
limitations: 当前页面优先展示局部子图，更多邻域需要继续展开。
更完整的证据应以后端 Neo4j 检索和问答结果为准。
relation.simple: L1HS 与 LINE-1 的关系属于同一谱系中的层级关系。

zh.line1FunctionTitle: 根据当前本地图谱，LINE-1 相关功能主要涉及逆转录转座、序列转导、插入突变及与其他转座元件协同的过程。
zh.line1DiseaseTitle: 根据当前本地图谱，LINE-1 与多种神经系统疾病、遗传综合征及肿瘤相关疾病存在结构化关联。
zh.l1hsPaperTitle: 当前本地图谱已经整理出与 L1HS 相关的文献证据，可用于支撑谱系、功能或疾病关系的解释。
zh.line1PaperTitle: 当前本地图谱已经整理出与 LINE-1 相关的核心文献，可用于支撑疾病、功能和谱系层面的解释。

fallbackDetailed.title: 当前本地演示图支持围绕 LINE-1 的疾病、功能、谱系关系与文献证据问答。
bullets: 你可以直接询问“LINE-1 相关疾病”“LINE-1 相关功能”。
也可以询问“L1HS 和 LINE-1 是什么关系”。
若需要证据，可继续追问文献支持情况。
fallbackDetailed.evidence: 当前回答来自本地演示图；更完整答案以后端知识检索与大模型生成结果为准。
limitations: 这是本地回退回答，不代表完整数据库检索结果。
当后端恢复后，详细模式会返回更完整的证据化回答。

relation.title: L1HS is modeled as a finer-grained node within the LINE-1 lineage.
bullets: L1HS is connected to LINE-1 through a SUBFAMILY_OF relation.
This is a lineage or classification relation rather than a disease or mechanism relation.
Keeping finer-grained hierarchy helps distinguish the broader lineage from specific active branches.
limitations: The current page emphasizes a local subgraph rather than the full graph.
Full evidence should be checked through the backend retrieval pipeline.
relation.simple: L1HS is connected to LINE-1 through a hierarchical relation within the same lineage.

en.line1FunctionTitle: According to the current local graph, LINE-1-related functions mainly involve retrotransposition, sequence transduction, insertional mutagenesis, and interactions with other transposable elements.
en.line1DiseaseTitle: According to the current local graph, LINE-1 shows structured associations with multiple neurological diseases, genetic syndromes, and cancers.
en.l1hsPaperTitle: The current local graph already contains literature evidence associated with L1HS.
en.line1PaperTitle: The current local graph already contains core literature evidence associated with LINE-1.

fallbackDetailed.title: The current local demo graph supports questions about LINE-1 diseases, functions, lineage relations, and literature evidence.
bullets: You can ask about LINE-1-related diseases or functions.
You can also ask how L1HS is related to LINE-1.
Literature evidence can be expanded when needed.
